issue.title: [Project] Team collaboration app
issue.body:
## Problem or goal
Create a lightweight collaboration app for small product teams.

## Target users
Team leads and individual contributors in small software teams.

## MVP scope
Workspace creation, basic task tracking, team invites, and activity visibility.

## Out of scope
Advanced reporting, billing, and external marketplace integrations.

## Platform
Web app.

## UI/UX direction
Use vibrant colors, generous whitespace, and a lightweight, friendly product feel that makes daily coordination fast.

## Constraints and integrations
Email delivery, simple auth, and a low-maintenance deployment model.

## Success criteria
A small team can create a workspace, invite teammates, and manage daily work without onboarding help.

artifact.title: Project brief: Team collaboration app
artifact.summary: Greenfield collaboration product for small software teams.

sections.Problem or goal: Create a lightweight collaboration app for small product teams.
UI/UX direction: Use a vibrant, approachable color palette.
Favor lightweight, low-friction task flows over dense dashboards.
Use generous whitespace and clear activity cues.
Success criteria: A team can create a workspace and invite teammates.
The MVP is usable without onboarding help.
